blurb: Restoration Shaman is the premier 5v5 healer of TBC arena and a staple of drain comps, built around Earth Shield uptime, Nature's Swiftness clutch heals, and totem control — Grounding and Tremor win games on their own. The list below reflects what gladiator-range resto shamans actually equip: the PvP set with honor offset pieces, resilience-first, mana problems solved by gear rather than playstyle.
statPriorityRationale: Resilience comes first because a dead shaman heals nobody — 300+ resil forces enemy teams off you and makes interrupt fishing their only win condition. Bonus healing is your throughput stat and scales every Healing Wave and Chain Heal; stamina is deceptively valuable when you are the kill target.

faq.question: What rating are these Restoration Shamans?
faq.answer: This snapshot covers 67 Restoration Shamans between 2109 and 2995 rating (average 2478) on the TBC Classic arena ladder, refreshed from public leaderboard data.

faq.question: What is the most-used Restoration Shaman PvP gear right now?
faq.answer: The highest-consensus picks are Merciless Gladiator's Redoubt (73%), Veteran's Pendant of Salvation (64%), Merciless Gladiator's Ringmail Armor (64%). Anything above ~70% usage at this rating range is effectively mandatory.

faq.question: How much of the Restoration Shaman BiS list is PvP gear vs raid gear?
faq.answer: 80% of the most-used slots are arena/honor items — for Restoration Shamans the resilience on PvP gear beats raid alternatives almost everywhere. The exceptions are listed as alternatives per slot.

faq.question: What weapon do Restoration Shamans use in arena?
faq.answer: Merciless Gladiator's Salvation is the main-hand of choice (58% of surveyed players).

faq.question: What gems do Restoration Shamans socket for PvP?
faq.answer: Across all sockets, the most-used gems in this snapshot are +9 Healing +3 Spell Damage and +2 Mana every 5 seconds, +4 Resilience Rating and +6 Stamina, +9 Healing +3 Spell Damage and +4 Intellect. Socket bonuses are usually ignored unless they align with these.
